title: symphyotrichum urophyllum
intro: Symphyotrichum urophyllum, also known as New England aster, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum urophyllum include reducing inflammation and improving digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial effects. Symphyotrichum urophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in herbal medicine.
